retrieved_result: What is HAProxy? Philippe Kolaczek Answered Oct 25, 2014I would say ... HAProxy is a free, very fast and reliable solution offering high availability, load balancing, and proxying for TCP and HTTP-based applications. More details for descritpion at The Reliable, High Performance TCP/HTTP Load Balancer This solution
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result describes HAProxy (a load balancer) rather than techniques or guidance for optimizing database queries.
